summary: Planned conservative one-action classification for the mixed PR inventory shard. No GitHub mutations are planned because this is plan mode, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, low-signal closeout is disabled, and the shard is not a dedupe cluster.

actions.reason: Already closed and merged; no cluster action remains.
Independent maintainer-owned feature/docs PR; keep open for normal maintainer or author follow-up.
Broad feature PR with failed proof gate; not closable as duplicate or low-signal in this shard.
Large provider/plugin feature with failed proof/dependency gates; keep open for normal review instead of closure.
Focused open bug-fix PR appears ready for maintainer review, but merge is blocked by job frontmatter and no duplicate/superseding canonical is hydrated.
Provider/auth integration PR should remain open for maintainers; no security quarantine or close action is supported by the hydrated evidence.
Focused bug-fix PR with passing checks remains independent; no close or merge action is allowed in this shard.
Small UI PR should remain open for review/proof resolution; no duplicate or superseding target is hydrated.
Distinct Matrix bug-fix PR remains independent; no duplicate closure is supported.
Focused open bug-fix PR appears ready for maintainer review, but merge is blocked and no close target exists.
Message-delivery PR has a proof-specific failure and should remain open for review; hydrated data does not justify security routing or closure.
Recent docs PR is independent and ready for maintainer review; no duplicate or low-signal closeout is enabled.
Small channel fix remains independent; failing check blocks merge-style recommendations but does not support closure.
Focused memory-core PR should remain open; failing checks block merge-style recommendations, and no close target exists.
Focused cron bug-fix PR appears ready for maintainer review, but merge is blocked and no duplicate/superseding path is hydrated.
Broad WhatsApp feature/fix PR has failed gates and mixed scope; keep open rather than close or route as security from this shard.
